priority_ranking.title: Training Agents to Self-Report Misbehavior
priority_ranking.rationale: Directly addresses the critical challenge of AI alignment in deployed agentic systems. Self-reporting mechanisms represent a paradigm shift in AI safety monitoring, moving from external oversight to internal transparency.

priority_ranking.title: Agent Behavioral Contracts: Formal Specification and Runtime Enforcement for Reliable Autonomous AI Agents
priority_ranking.rationale: Formal behavioral contracts are essential infrastructure for reliable autonomous AI. This addresses the most pressing gap in agentic AI deployment: runtime safety guarantees.

priority_ranking.title: Memory-Dominated Quantum Criticality as a Universal Route to High-Temperature Superconductivity
priority_ranking.rationale: A universal route to high-Tc superconductivity would be transformative for energy, computing, and transportation. Highest novelty score in this scan.

priority_ranking.title: Intent Laundering: AI Safety Datasets Are Not What They Seem
priority_ranking.rationale: Exposes fundamental flaws in AI safety evaluation infrastructure. High probability and urgency because affected datasets are already in wide use.

priority_ranking.title: The Road to Useful Quantum Computers
priority_ranking.rationale: Comprehensive roadmap from leading researchers. Defines milestones toward practical quantum computing with economic and security implications.

priority_ranking.title: Global River Forecasting with a Topology-Informed AI Foundation Model
priority_ranking.rationale: Climate adaptation through AI. Global-scale river forecasting addresses immediate threats from flooding and water scarcity affecting billions.

priority_ranking.title: The 2025 AI Agent Index: Documenting Technical and Safety Features of Deployed Agentic AI Systems
priority_ranking.rationale: First systematic inventory of deployed agentic AI systems. High probability as it documents existing reality rather than proposing new technology.

priority_ranking.title: Sustainable LLM Inference using Context-Aware Model Switching
priority_ranking.rationale: Addresses the growing energy crisis of AI inference. Practical solution with immediate deployment potential for reducing AI's environmental footprint.

priority_ranking.title: CourtGuard: A Model-Agnostic Framework for Zero-Shot Policy Adaptation in LLM Safety
priority_ranking.rationale: Addresses the critical gap between evolving AI regulations and deployed models. Zero-shot adaptation enables real-time compliance without retraining.

priority_ranking.title: Orthogonal Weight Modification Enhances Learning Scalability without Gradient Backpropagation
priority_ranking.rationale: Fundamentally challenges the backpropagation paradigm that has dominated deep learning for decades. Very high novelty but uncertain path to practical impact.

priority_ranking.title: HubScan: Detecting Hubness Poisoning in RAG Systems
priority_ranking.rationale: RAG systems are becoming the default architecture for enterprise AI. Hubness poisoning is a newly identified attack vector requiring immediate attention.

priority_ranking.title: Mirroring the Mind: Distilling Human-Like Metacognitive Strategies into LLMs
priority_ranking.rationale: Metacognition is a key missing capability in current LLMs. Bridging this gap could unlock more reliable and self-aware AI reasoning.

priority_ranking.title: Epistemic Filtering and Collective Hallucination: A Jury Theorem for Confidence-Calibrated Agents
priority_ranking.rationale: Multi-agent hallucination is an emerging risk as agentic AI systems proliferate. Jury theorem framework provides theoretical tools to understand and mitigate it.

priority_ranking.title: Zatom-1: A Multimodal Flow Foundation Model for 3D Molecules and Materials
priority_ranking.rationale: Foundation models for materials science could accelerate drug discovery and sustainable materials development, with broad long-term impact.

priority_ranking.title: Patient-Centered, Graph-Augmented AI for Early Stroke Risk Detection
priority_ranking.rationale: Stroke is a leading cause of death and disability. Early passive detection in high-risk populations could save lives at scale.
